question: What do replacement personnel do to a Sherman crew?
short_answer: They restore function but lower familiarity, slow coordination, and often carry the memory of who was lost before them.
evidence_summary: Bomb shows a wounded commander replaced in a preserved tank history.
Polish and Canadian sources show replacements under the pressure of continuing operations.
Combat stress sources show why new crew members do not inherit full confidence immediately.

structured_data.memory_effect: the vehicle remembers the losses even when the roster changes

simulation_variables.effect: controls how fast the new loader or commander settles in.
drops after a replacement until the crew re-stabilizes.
can be shaken if replacements are handled badly.

game_implications: Replacement should be a morale event, not only a health refill.
The player should have to re-earn crew rhythm after losses.
